---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the accessibility need or user pain point this would address.
     Who would benefit, and how? Be as specific as possible. -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe what you'd like to see. How would it work? What would the user experience be? -->

## Alternatives You've Considered

<!-- Are there other ways to solve this? What are the tradeoffs? -->

## Who would benefit?

<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] AAC users
- [ ] People with dyslexia
- [ ] People with cognitive disabilities
- [ ] Caregivers / SLPs
- [ ] English language learners
- [ ] Older adults
- [ ] Other: _______________

## Additional Context

<!-- Screenshots, mockups, links to similar tools, research, or anything else helpful -->

---

**Note:** ClearPath prioritizes features that directly improve accessibility. Features that don't serve a clear accessibility need are less likely to be added, but we'll always explain our reasoning.
